name: create_translation
description: Translate audio from any supported language into English text using the Whisper Large V3 model on Groq hardware. The input audio can be in any language that Whisper supports, and the output will always be English text. Accepts the same audio formats as transcription. Maximum file size is 25 MB.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The audio file to translate. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm. Max 25 MB.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model to use for translation. Currently supported: 'whisper-large-v3'.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Optional text to guide the model's style or provide context. Should be in English.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 1. Lower values are more deterministic. Default: 0.

body.text: Hello, welcome to our company. Today we are going to discuss the new product launch planned for next quarter. The marketing team has prepared a comprehensive strategy that covers digital advertising, social media campaigns, and press outreach.
